item.title: Re: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded:
I wasn't talking about the votings, I was talking about the formatting.

The formatting is fine. It follows the standard template; there isn't anything else required.

item.title: Re: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded: Yes, I understand, but I wasn't talking about the votings, I was talking about the formatting.

item.title: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded:
GodlyUser, please do not make accusations against authors on the mainsite like this. Rather, let a staff member know if you notice a suspicious pattern of voting.

how calm it gets so many ratings?!

The page was originally posted almost a month ago, and has fewer than 30 total votes. That's about one vote per day, which isn't a lot.

item.title: Asking.
item.content:encoded: I don't hold any urge against this SCP at all, but how calm it gets so many ratings?! I mean the formats are not even comparable to the ones that're currently in the low-rated sections, yet the information is lesser than the ones in the low formatted pages unless the author is using some kind of sub-accounts that he/she has and started to-rated their own pages…just guessing.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hello Author,

I provided some crit for this during its development/draft stage. Unfortunately for me many of the concerns I had during your drafting process remain, namely with the conclusion and how this piece wraps up. To me, it feels as if about half a dozen ideas are just walked across the screen real quick and then walked out just as fast.

I echo the sentiment of the other reviews above me, and the same commend I gave during crit, the ending is abrupt and I don't feel a sense of a greater "message" here. Much of your imagery is evocative but it isnt enough on its own.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I agree with Wizz. I don't understand what you're trying to say? But that aside, there's nothing here but a flesh wall that has a bad memory talking and the mystery surrounding it that I still don't know about.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feel like Addendum 3-D is supposed to explain something about SCP-5924's existence or behaviour or something, but I'm just not getting it.
